name: What proof do I need for machine caught my hand at work?
description: Medical records, photos, witnesses, maintenance logs.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for machine caught my hand at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, photos, witnesses, maintenance logs.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, witness statements, photos of machine defect, maintenance logs, and incident report.** Show accident arose from employment[1][4]. Expert analysis proves malfunction. Preserve evidence before cleanup. Video surveillance helps. Lawyer gathers it all.
